title: Palamod renew
description: A remake for newer version of the palamod remade from scratch
body:
## Palamod renew an extended Minecraft adventure

The Palamod is a mod who recreates a very known French mod who are still in 1.7.10 for nearly 10 years ( 2014-2025)

So for fun, I recreate it with his most fun features 

### What's the mod adding?

The mod adds new 9 types of ores :
- **Amethyst** ( basic low-tier ores, useful  for some craft )
- **Titane** (a little upgrade from the amethyst but still low-tier )
- **Paladium** ( a good ore for most of the features of the mod, medium tier )
- - **Green Paladium** ( equal to the paladium in terms of durability, damage, etc but it's a very rare variant you find in some biome )
- **Findium** ( a crystal that doesn't have large use but some craft need it like cave block )
- **Trixium** ( Doesn't do anything but can be used for collection with /trixium command )
- **Mixed Endium** ( A material who has an excellant armor, can be craft using endium fragments and green paladium )
- **Endium** ( The rarest ore in the mod, cannot be mined but only be  crafted or grown with the orangeblue or the crusher )
![Ores in the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VoSqv9k7/images/a1e982bc8bae64c25a04d0f646ac97929bd4970e.png)

They all have armor and a tool set ( except for the trixium and findium )
![all armors in the mod ( top one are paladium armor variant usable with /customswap )](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ada6ef73a470fb8a64f0b72dae7868805f797ccd.png)
There are some other amazing features:
- 4 types of wood ( jacaranda, judeecercis, erable, and Ostrya)
  ![trees in the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3788c3c6e0376a2ac14cdaa1795056e3a59a0490.png)
- An unbreakable upgradable pickaxe
- A hammer that mines 3x3 and can duplicate ( with the fortune enchantement ) and smelt ore ( with the smelt enchantment )
  ![Hammer ig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VoSqv9k7/images/caf9ee99f93603d119ff4fe870b9381b76b8ba35.png)
- An integrated admin shop with automatic transaction 
- Some new biome with new structure in them
  ![exemple of custom biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/babb817ff5f240a02b11e263f5d98b7b2c5de42e.png)
- It's own money system with /money /pay and unique block that can automate generating money
- Custom craft are shown in jei
- New Miner dimension
  ![Miner Dimension](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VoSqv9k7/images/b5645929a3d317c132a113b38e18118446b889f3.png)

### A little bit of story

The mod was originally created in 2014 by [FuzeIII](https://www.youtube.com/@FuzeIII) for his modded Minecraft, [Paladium]( https://paladium-pvp.fr)  But the mod was exclusive to the server with a special launcher and solo was deactivated to people avoid finding exploits and breaking the server ( because at the time, the server has a large number of cheaters and hackers ) But players want to play  solo with the mod ( If you want to know how many people want to play solo type "palamod solo" on youtube. ) So like I said I recreated the mod from scratch so even if you break the mod can't break the server ( and it has several upgrades like more hammer and a system to automatize the admin shop and also have the newest Minecraft  updates ) 

- -> No money was or will be made with the mod
- -> I am not affiliated with [Paladium](https://paladium-pvp.fr),[FuzeIII](https://www.youtube.com/@FuzeIII) or mojang ( or Microsoft )


- [ note ] Translation is available in english and french
- [ Notice ] La traduction est disponible en français et anglais
